incorrect.source_says: H1 is a human ES (embryonic stem) cell line, not an iPSC. The iPSC lines used were 3-5 and 20-1. The primary lines were hESCs H1, H9, and UM77-2.
incorrect.evidence_quote: Human ES cell lines H1 (NIH registry #0043) and H9 (NIH registry #0062) were obtained from WiCell Research Institute. Human ES line UM77-2 (NIH registry #0278) was obtained from the University of Michigan. iPSC lines 3-5 and 20-1 were generated at Cincinnati Children's Hospital
incorrect.source_loc: Materials and methods > Maintenance of hESCs

incorrect.source_says: mTeSR1 is only the pluripotent-maintenance medium. The protocol uses RPMI 1640 for definitive-endoderm differentiation and Advanced DMEM/F12 ('foregut media') for foregut/organoid culture; these differentiation base media were omitted.
incorrect.evidence_quote: Stem cells were maintained on Matrigel ... in mTeSR1 medium ... Cells were treated with Activin A (100 ng ml -1) for 3 consecutive days in RPMI 1640 media ... cells were incubated in foregut media: Advanced DMEM/F12 plus N-2 and B27 supplement
incorrect.source_loc: Materials and methods > Maintenance / Differentiation into definitive endoderm / Differentiation into anterior foregut

recall_misses.item: Additional cell lines (multiple hESC + iPSC lines)
recall_misses.source_says: Lines H9 (NIH #0062), UM77-2 (NIH #0278), and iPSC lines 3-5 and 20-1 were all used; extraction reported only a single (mislabeled) line.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human ES cell lines H1 (NIH registry #0043) and H9 (NIH registry #0062) ... Human ES line UM77-2 (NIH registry #0278) ... iPSC lines 3-5 and 20-1 were generated at Cincinnati Children's Hospital
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Maintenance of hESCs

recall_misses.source_says: RPMI 1640 is the base medium for the Activin A definitive-endoderm step.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Cells were treated with Activin A (100 ng ml -1) for 3 consecutive days in RPMI 1640 media (Life Technologies, Grand Island, NY)
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Differentiation of PSCs into definitive endoderm

recall_misses.source_says: Advanced DMEM/F12 is the base for foregut, maintenance, spheroid and organoid culture.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: cells were incubated in foregut media: Advanced DMEM/F12 plus N-2 and B27 supplement, 10 mM Hepes, 1x L-Glutamine (200 mM), 1x Penicillin-streptomycin (5000 U/ml...)
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Differentiation of definitive endoderm into anterior foregut

recall_misses.item: HyClone defined FBS (dFBS) graded serum during endoderm step
recall_misses.source_says: Endoderm differentiation uses increasing dFBS concentrations 0%, 0.2%, 2%; distinct from the 1% FBS overlay extracted.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: with increasing concentrations of 0%, 0.2% and 2% HyClone defined fetal bovine serum (dFBS, Thermo Scientific, West Palm Beach, FL)
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Differentiation of PSCs into definitive endoderm

recall_misses.source_says: Stage durations are explicit: 4-day Activin A (3 days dosing), 4 days NOG+SB foregut, 4-6 days NOG+SB+FGF4+Ch(+SAG) spheroid generation, 8-day maintenance with growth factors; Figure 3D timeline shows Day 1/6/10/20/50 of FGF10 culture; media replaced every 4 days; organoids re-embedded every 10-15 days.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: a 4-day Activin A ... protocol ... for 4 days ... with NOG, SB, 500 ng/ml FGF4 ... and 2 uM CHIR99021 ... for 4-6 days ... overlaid and replaced every 4 days. Organoids were transferred into new Matrigel droplets every 10-15 days.
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods (multiple) + Figure 3D (visual timeline: Day 1,6,10,20,50)

recall_misses.source_says: Organoids re-embedded in fresh Matrigel droplets every 10-15 days; reported as not_reported in extraction.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Organoids were transferred into new Matrigel droplets every 10-15 days.
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Directed differentiation into ... lung organoids

recall_misses.item: Culture conditions: 37C incubation, RT Matrigel setting
recall_misses.source_says: Spheroids embedded in Matrigel incubated at room temperature 10 min; matrix seeding incubated at 37C 30 min; culture_conditions reported not_extracted.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: incubated at room temperature for 10 min ... incubated at 37C for 30 min without media
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > lung organoids / decellularized lung matrices

recall_misses.source_says: Lung spheroids were also seeded onto decellularized human lung matrix slices, an additional culture matrix not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human lungs ... were decellularized as previously described ... Matrix slices were placed in a 96 well plate and approximately 50 NOG+SB+F+Ch+SAG spheres were pipetted directly onto the matrices.
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Seeding lung spheroids on decellularized human lung matrices

recall_misses.source_says: Matrigel BD Bioscience #356237, embedded as droplets in a 24-well plate; matrix percent and vendor/catalog not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: spheroids were embedded in a droplet of Matrigel (BD Bioscience #356237) in one well of a 24 well plate
recall_misses.source_loc: Materials and methods > Directed differentiation into ... lung organoids

notes: Dye et al. 2015 eLife human lung organoid (HLO) protocol. Dose/factor extraction is strong: 14/15 signaling factor and supplement concentrations match source verbatim (Activin A 100, Noggin 200, SB431542 10uM, FGF2 50/500, Sant-2 10uM, SU5402 10uM, SHH 100, FGF4 500, CHIR99021 2uM, FGF10 500, SAG no dose given). Two correctness issues: (1) H1 mislabeled as iPSC -- it is an hESC line; (2) base_media collapsed to only mTeSR1, missing RPMI 1640 and Advanced DMEM/F12 differentiation media. Main weakness is RECALL: the entire timeline array is empty despite explicit stage durations in text and a visual Day 1/6/10/20/50 timeline in Figure 3D; passaging interval (every 10-15 days), 37C/RT conditions, the dFBS gradient, the decellularized lung matrix scaffold, and the additional cell lines (H9, UM77-2, iPSC 3-5/20-1) were all missed. Multimodal=true: schematic figures (Fig 1A/D, Fig 3A/D) were visually read and corroborate the staged protocol/timeline. Extractor: tier1_local gemma3:12b.
